query:
SELECT b.id, b.guestName, b.guestEmail, b.numberOfGuests, b.paymentStatus, b.totalAmount, b.createdAt, h.hostName
FROM bookings b
LEFT JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id
WHERE h.hostName LIKE '%test%' OR h.hostName LIKE '%Test%'
ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT b.id, b.guestName, b.guestEmail, b.numberOfGuests, b.paymentStatus, b.totalAmount, b.createdAt, h.hostName
FROM bookings b
LEFT JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id
WHERE h.hostName LIKE '%test%' OR h.hostName LIKE '%Test%'
ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
